title: Logistics and Warehouse Officer #78857
description:
Job Description

  • Industry/ Organization Type: IT Service
  • Position Title: Logistics and Warehouse Officer
  • Working Location: Tampines
  • Working Hours: 5 days (Mon – Fri, 9.00am – 6.00pm)
  • Salary Package: Basic salary up to $3,000 + OT + Variable Bonus
  • Duration: Permanent Role

Key Responsibilities

  • Follow instructions from your supervisor/company for transporting items/equipment.
  • Plan and coordinate the transport and delivery of goods to internal and external customers, ensuring timely deliveries and efficient routes.
  • Maintain and update delivery schedules to ensure on-time deliveries.
  • Load and unload items/equipment safely.
  • Take responsibility for the safety and full accountability of delivered items with proper documentation.
  • Ensure delivered items are safe and fully accounted for with proper documentation.
  • Oversee daily warehouse operations, including receiving, storing, and dispatching goods.
  • Ensure goods are properly labelled, stored, and protected to prevent damage.
  • Monitor inventory levels, conduct regular stock checks, and keep accurate records in warehouse management systems.
  • Implement and manage inventory control procedures to reduce stock discrepancies.
  • Ensure the warehouse complies with health, safety, and environmental regulations.
  • Keep the warehouse clean and organized to minimize hazards and ensure a safe working environment.
  • Follow safety procedures and best practices for handling equipment.
  • Maintain the assigned vehicle to keep it safe and clean.
  • Perform other related duties as needed.

APPLY NOW!!!

  • At least 1 years of experience in logistics or a similar role.
  • Knowledge on how to use warehouse system will be a plus.
  • Having a valid Class 3 driving licence is an advantage.
  • Good communication and teamwork abilities.

Kindly apply through ANY of the following methods:

  • Submit your application by clicking the APPLY button;
  • Email your resume to Job@anradus.com.sg. Please indicate #78857 on the email subject.

Anradus Application Policy: We value each application and ensure every resume is reviewed. Our process is efficient, typically concluding within 3 working days. If you do not receive communication from us within this timeframe, it's likely that your application has not been shortlisted by our client. In such cases, we recommend continuing your job search to maximize your opportunities.
